# Toolkit universal-census fixture

These three files were copied byte-for-byte from the completed order-2 run at
`Article-Total-Coloring/computations/runs/wave-2-universal-61c576f/order-02`.
They were produced by public `total-coloring-toolkit` commit
`61c576fba28a03a91f6a7695e21d130cd7e76f22` with:

```text
total-coloring universal-census --order 2 --output order-02
```

The embedded manifest binds toolkit source digest
`61c154914c407b8f6de1d3c0f0f374c9f478fe3bcc083890031a788c4afdb337`
and the exact `geng` executable digest. Tests package only the three toolkit
outputs into a deterministic in-memory release archive; this README is not an
archive member.
